title: Doors: Reloaded
description: Enhanced door and trapdoor textures with properly mapped sides and dedicated item textures.
body:
# Doors: Reloaded
*Enhances door and trapdoor textures with realistic details, improving both functionality and aesthetics across all variants. The main goal is to properly map each door and trapdoor with the proper textures on the sides, which by default are messed up.*

## Features
  - Added proper hinges on the sides of all doors
  - Implemented detailed handles on all door types
  - Recolored hardware elements to match each wood type
  - Redesigned iron door and trapdoor with unique aesthetics
  - Completely retextured door inventory items
  - Simplified 2D trapdoor items for better identification

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!

## Credits
- [Door Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/door-tweaks) by: [StormDragon77](https://modrinth.com/user/StormDragon77)
